hooks.command: node -e "const p=require('path'),f=require('fs'),h=require('os').homedir();const r=(()=>{const e=process.env.CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT;if(e&&e.trim()){const c=p.resolve(e.trim());if(f.existsSync(p.join(c,'scripts/hooks/plugin-hook-bootstrap.js')))return c}const d=p.join(h(),'.claude'),s=[p.join(d,'plugins/marketplaces/claude-req-sys/plugins/claude-req-sys')];for(const c of s){if(f.existsSync(p.join(c,'scripts/hooks/plugin-hook-bootstrap.js')))return c}try{const b=p.join(d,'plugins/cache/claude-req-sys/claude-req-sys');if(f.existsSync(b)){for(const o of f.readdirSync(b,{withFileTypes:true}))for(const v of f.readdirSync(p.join(b,o.name),{withFileTypes:true})){const c=p.join(b,o.name,v.name);if(f.existsSync(p.join(c,'scripts/hooks/plugin-hook-bootstrap.js')))return c}}}catch(x){}return p.resolve('scripts/hooks/plugin-hook-bootstrap.js','..','..')}();process.env.CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT=r;require(p.join(r,'scripts/hooks/plugin-hook-bootstrap.js'))" scripts/conversation-logger/hooks/session-start.js
